executive_summary: LightCube analyzed idea input in shape mode and recommends focusing on signal-backed idea shaping into a first buildable scope. The strongest near-term move is to tighten the first convincing use case, reduce time-to-value, and validate repeat behavior before broadening scope.

signal_brief.title: Founder idea
signal_brief.summary: AI-powered meal planning app for busy professionals

problem_map: Core user and wedge may still be blended together.
The product may solve too many adjacent jobs at once.
Distribution logic is not yet tightly bound to the product loop.

conditional_validation_stack.claim: Target user enters the core flow
conditional_validation_stack.signal_needed: landing page click or signup intent

conditional_validation_stack.claim: User reaches first value within one session

strategy_memo.target_user: Founder or PM with a rough idea and no sharp wedge yet
strategy_memo.wedge: signal-backed idea shaping into a first buildable scope
strategy_memo.core_problem: Core user and wedge may still be blended together.
strategy_memo.core_flow: Input context → collect signals → pressure-test direction → compile build plan
strategy_memo.distribution_hypothesis: High-signal audits and decision packs can act as both acquisition and trust-building content.
strategy_memo.business_model: Subscription with premium strategy runs and optional execution orchestration.

evidence_used.title: Founder idea
evidence_used.summary: AI-powered meal planning app for busy professionals

prd.title: cli-run LightCube v1
prd.objective: Turn messy product inputs into decision-ready direction and agent-ready execution.
prd.primary_user: Founder or PM with a rough idea and no sharp wedge yet
must_have_features: Input form for URL or idea
success_metrics: Percent of generated tasks accepted by the team

tasks.title: Implement intake workflow
tasks.description: Build URL and idea submission flow.

tasks.title: Review strategy wedge
tasks.description: Confirm target user and core wedge.

tasks.title: Design activation metric
tasks.description: Define first-value event and success threshold.

simulation_summary.retention_risk: high if first value is delayed

forecast.note: Advanced forecasting is optional in v1.
priority_scenarios: distribution fails without a repeatable signal loop
